cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. I need to figure out when Thomas could have gone to the football field. The question says that the football field was closed after 9pm, so he must have gone before that. Let me list out all the times when Thomas was seen doing other things. First, Thomas woke up at 8am. Then David saw him fixing the computer from 8am to 10am. So he was at the electronic store during that time. Then Jennifer saw him buying lunch from 10am to 12pm at the deli. After that, Lisa saw him walking towards the Statue of Liberty from 12pm to 2pm. Then Sarah saw him buying a phone from 2pm to 5pm at the electronics store. Finally, Kimberly saw him buying a bike from 6pm to 9pm at the bike shop. And the football field is closed after 9pm. So, I need to find the times when Thomas wasn't doing any of these activities. Let's break it down by time intervals: - 8am to 10am: Fixing computer - 10am to 12pm: Buying lunch - 12pm to 2pm: Walking to Statue of Liberty - 2pm to 5pm: Buying phone - 6pm to 9pm: Buying bike So the timeline of his known activities is: 8am-10am, then 10am-12pm, then 12pm-2pm, then 2pm-5pm, then there's a gap from 5pm to 6pm, then 6pm-9pm. The football field closes at 9pm, so he must have gone before that. The only time gap here is between 5pm and 6pm. Before 5pm, he was buying a phone until 5pm. After 6pm, he was buying a bike. So between 5pm and 6pm, there's no mention of what he was doing. Therefore, he could have gone to the football field during that time, as the field is still open until 9pm.
